title: The Pirates of Capri
director: Edgar G. Ulmer, Giuseppe Maria Scotese
writer: Giorgio Moser, Golfiero Colonna, Sidney Alexander
actors: Louis Hayward, Binnie Barnes, Mariella Lotti
plot: A group of men calling themselves 'The Pirates of Capri", headed by Captain Sirroco, who is really Count Amalfi, are trying to restore freedom to the people of Naples in 1799. The Queen is advised of the pirate's assault of a memb...
